game.name: Pokémon : Tectonic
game.desc: Pokémon Tectonic is a fan-made Pokémon RPG set in the underground-focused Makya region. It features a nonlinear story, extensive side quests, and a major rebalance of Pokémon, moves, and abilities so every Pokémon is viable. The game includes Pokémon up to Generation 8, regional forms, new evolutions, and quality-of-life improvements, with a strong emphasis on strategy and exploration.
